testcase.name: test_put_reminder_times_1day
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_reminder_preferences.py:31: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please slow down.","retry_after":"5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
